creator: adamr@bargainhardware.co.uk
text:
Good Morning FreeBSD Team,

Could I kindly request a listing on your hardware vendor directory for my Bargain Hardware (UK).

"Bargain Hardware supply a huge variety of refurbished desktops and laptops, all of which are offered with FreeBSD OS installation as an option on the website configurator. Server and Workstation installation is also available by request of our sales team."

Full details for application are detailed below, while the following two links provide detail of our offering.

Free OS installation explainer: https://www.bargainhardware.co.uk/linux-for-desktops-laptops

Example product page with FreeBSD option: https://www.bargainhardware.co.uk/hp-elitedesk-800-g1-sff-a-configure-to-order

Company name – Bargain Hardware
URL - https://www.bargainhardware.co.uk  
E-mail address – sales@bargainhardware.co.uk
Phone number - +44 1254 878 801
Country - UK
Shipping to - UK, EU, US, CA and Australia

Many thanks for your time and attention

Kind Regards
Adam Ramsbottom
Owner
Bargain Hardware
